message:
fix(core,journal,ondisk): add truncate type guards, extent depth limit, COW robustness, and btrfs item offset fix

- Add directory/symlink/non-extent guards in ext4 and btrfs setattr
  truncate paths, returning appropriate errors instead of attempting to
  truncate non-regular files
- Add extent tree depth limit (max 5) in grow_root_index to prevent
  unbounded tree growth from corrupt extent metadata
- Rewrite NativeCowJournal::open to use decode_cow_record() instead of
  raw magic/zero checks, making it reject malformed tail records with
  explicit errors rather than silently stopping
- Make recover_native_cow treat FfsError::Format errors as clean stop
  signals while propagating other errors, enabling recovery to succeed
  up to a malformed record
- Add FailNthWriteBlockDevice test helper and three COW robustness tests:
  malformed tail rejection, failed commit not advancing tail, and clean
  recovery stopping at malformed records
- Remove unused has_cow_magic helper
- Fix btrfs leaf item offset parsing: item offsets are relative to header
  end, not absolute — add BTRFS_HEADER_SIZE to raw offset with overflow
  check, and update test fixture construction accordingly
- Format cleanup in ext4 lookup assertion and poisoned-mutex helper

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
